notes: Matched as the PI raw DMA helper.
Uses local symbols func_80004B30 and D_80000308 for osVirtualToPhysical/osRomBase.
PI register accesses use the D_A46000xx externs used elsewhere in the kernel.
relayout_note: 2026-06-10 kernel ROM-order relayout: final_c corrected to the byte-exact form (the previously logged body was verified against a shifted baseline and did NOT compile to ROM bytes).
